projects.title: GAT Interact 2026 - Inter College
projects.description: As Technical Convenor for INTERACT 2026, I engineered a high-concurrency registration engine using Next.js and Node.js. This mission-critical platform served as the primary gateway for a flagship inter-college festival, managing real-time participant registration and automated data validation for over 1,000 users. By optimizing the frontend and backend for peak traffic, I eliminated administrative bottlenecks, ensuring a seamless, scalable, and highly reliable user experience throughout the event.

projects.title: GAT Interact 2026 - Inter Department
projects.description: As Technical Convenor for INTERACT 2026, I engineered a high-concurrency registration engine using Next.js and Node.js. This mission-critical platform served as the primary gateway for an interdepartmental event, managing real-time registrations and automated data validation for over 1,000 users. By optimizing the frontend and backend for peak traffic, I eliminated administrative bottlenecks, ensuring a seamless, scalable, and highly reliable experience for all participating departments.

awards.title: Blockchain and its Applications
awards.description: I successfully earned the Elite Certification in Blockchain and its Applications from IIT Kharagpur, ranking in the top 5% of candidates nationwide. This 12-week intensive course covered advanced concepts of decentralized ledgers, consensus algorithms (Proof of Work, Proof of Stake), Smart Contracts, Solidity programming, and practical applications of blockchain technology in modern enterprise environments.

awards.title: Registration Domain Co-Convener
awards.description: As the Registration Domain Co-Convener for INTERACT 2025 at Global Academy of Technology, I managed the entry and exit for 3,500+ participants and 7,000+ attendees. Beyond logistics, my team and I focused on creating a welcoming first impression for this award-winning festival. Leading this effort taught me that true leadership is about empowering others to excel. I am proud to have helped deliver a seamless, professional experience that contributed to the event's remarkable success.

awards.title: Networking Basics
awards.description: Active member of the ICC club on campus, contributing to group collaborations, organizing campus tech-talks, and engaging in student community development activities.
